title: France summons Elon Musk over X probe
summary_full: Authorities issued a summons for Musk as part of an investigation, launched in January 2025, into allegations that X's algorithm was used to interfere in French politics
summary_public: Authorities issued a summons for Musk as part of an investigation, launched in January 2025, into allegations that X's algorithm was used to interfere in French politics

FR.label: negative
FR.evidence: investigation, launched in January 2025, into allegations that X's algorithm was used to interfere in French politics
